reports.source_window: Previous 24 hours through the pre-market cutoff
reports.dynamic_headline: U.S. equity futures point to a higher open after a historic Dow rally on the Trump-Iran ceasefire, a supportive jobs report, and continued AI investment optimism, but a heat wave and geopolitical undercurrents loom.
reports.dynamic_headline_zh: 美国股指期货指向高开，此前道指因特朗普-伊朗停火协议、利好就业报告以及AI投资乐观情绪持续而创下历史性大涨，但热浪和地缘政治暗流仍构成隐忧。
reports.market_summary: Markets were closed Friday for Independence Day. The prior session (Thursday) saw the Dow’s best day in a year after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire, relieving immediate geopolitical pressure. The June jobs report further eased rate hike fears by showing a cooling labor market. Tech futures jumped into the holiday weekend, led by semiconductors. Over the weekend, headlines included the launch of ‘Trump Accounts,’ extreme heat threatening power grids, AI infrastructure spending surges, and multiple analyst upgrades on key tech names. The setup suggests a risk-on open Monday, but breadth and volume will need to confirm the rally’s sustainability.
reports.market_summary_zh: 上周五因独立日假期休市。前一交易日（周四）因美国与伊朗达成两周停火协议，地缘政治压力暂时缓解，道指创下一年来最大单日涨幅。6月就业报告显示劳动力市场降温，进一步缓解了加息担忧。科技股期货在假期周末前上涨，半导体领涨。周末头条新闻包括“特朗普账户”推出、极端高温威胁电网、AI基础设施支出激增以及多家分析师上调关键科技股评级。市场格局暗示周一开盘风险偏好回升，但涨势的可持续性需得到市场广度和成交量的确认。

top_events.title: U.S. and Iran Agree to Two-Week Ceasefire – Dow Surges
top_events.title_zh: 美伊同意两周停火——道指飙升

top_events.title_zh: AI基础设施支出2026年将达到创纪录2400亿美元

top_events.title_zh: 6月就业报告低于预期，缓解加息担忧

top_events.title: Tech Futures Jump Into Holiday Weekend – AI Semis Lead
top_events.title_zh: 科技期货假期周末上涨——AI半导体领涨

top_events.title: Extreme Heat Wave Threatens U.S. Power Grids – July 4 Travel at Risk
top_events.title_zh: 极端热浪威胁美国电网——7月4日旅行面临风险

reports.dynamic_headline: Wall Street ends mixed as a sharply weaker-than-expected June jobs report fuels rate-cut hopes and sends the Dow to a record, while a brutal sell-off in AI and semiconductor stocks drags the Nasdaq lower.
reports.dynamic_headline_zh: 华尔街收盘涨跌互现，6月就业报告远逊预期激发降息希望，道指创纪录新高；AI与半导体股惨烈抛售拖累纳指走低。
reports.market_summary: U.S. equity markets closed mixed on Thursday, July 2, 2026, in a holiday-shortened session. The Dow Jones Industrial Average notched a fresh record closing high, buoyed by a dramatic rotation into value and cyclical stocks. In stark contrast, the tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite fell sharply, dragged down by a severe sell-off in semiconductor and AI-related names. The divergence was triggered by a much weaker-than-expected June nonfarm payrolls report, which showed only 57,000 jobs added versus the 115,000 consensus estimate, alongside a troubling drop in the labor force participation rate to a 50-year low outside of the pandemic era. This data simultaneously boosted hopes for Federal Reserve rate cuts while raising fears of an economic slowdown, leading to a violent sector rotation out of high-growth tech and into defensive and rate-sensitive sectors.
reports.market_summary_zh: 美国股市在2026年7月2日（周四）的假期缩短交易中收盘涨跌互现。道琼斯工业平均指数创下历史收盘新高，得益于资金大幅轮动至价值股和周期股。与此形成鲜明对比的是，以科技股为主的纳斯达克综合指数大幅下跌，半导体和人工智能相关股票遭到严重抛售。市场分化是由远逊预期的6月非农就业报告引发的，该报告显示仅新增5.7万个就业岗位，远低于11.5万的普遍预期，同时劳动力参与率降至疫情时代以外的50年低点，令人担忧。这一数据同时提振了美联储降息的希望，并引发了对经济放缓的担忧，导致资金从高增长科技股剧烈轮动至防御性和利率敏感型板块。

top_events.title: U.S. Job Creation Cools Sharply in June, Payrolls Rise Only 57,000
top_events.title_zh: 美国6月就业增长急剧放缓，仅增5.7万人

top_events.title: Labor Force Participation Rate Falls to 50-Year Low, Job Seekers Giving Up
top_events.title_zh: 劳动力参与率降至50年低点，求职者放弃寻找工作

top_events.title: Dow Jones Industrial Average Closes at a New Record High
top_events.title_zh: 道琼斯工业平均指数收于历史新高

top_events.title: Trump blasts ‘hostile’ Fed and says Warsh ‘has to do what he has to do’ on interest rates
top_events.title_zh: 特朗普抨击“敌对”的美联储，称沃什“必须做他该做的事”

top_events.title: Bitcoin surges past $62K as U.S. payroll miss dents Fed rate hike odds
top_events.title_zh: 美国非农数据不及预期削弱美联储加息概率，比特币飙升至6.2万美元以上

reports.dynamic_headline: Wall Street kicks off the second half with a mixed session as a sharp sell-off in semiconductor and AI-linked stocks, triggered by Meta's cloud pivot and profit-taking, offsets broad market strength, while trade policy uncertainty and a softer-than-expected ADP jobs report add to the cautious tone.
reports.dynamic_headline_zh: 华尔街开启下半年交易，市场表现分化。受Meta云业务转型及获利了结影响，半导体和AI相关股票遭大幅抛售，抵消了市场的广泛涨势，同时贸易政策的不确定性和弱于预期的ADP就业报告加剧了市场的谨慎情绪。
reports.market_summary: U.S. equity markets closed mixed on the first trading day of the second half of 2026. The Dow Jones Industrial Average and the S&P 500 eked out modest gains, supported by strength in defensive sectors and energy, while the tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite fell nearly 1%, dragged down by a brutal rotation out of semiconductor stocks. The session was characterized by a sharp divergence between the 'old economy' and high-growth tech, as investors digested a weaker-than-expected ADP private payrolls report, hawkish-leaning comments from Fed Governor Kevin Warsh, and a major strategic pivot from Meta Platforms that upended the AI infrastructure trade. The S&P 500 remains up roughly 10% year-to-date, but the start of Q3 suggests a shift in market leadership is underway.
reports.market_summary_zh: 美国股市在2026年下半年首个交易日收盘涨跌互现。道琼斯工业平均指数和标普500指数在防御性板块和能源股的支撑下小幅收高，而以科技股为主的纳斯达克综合指数则因半导体股遭遇残酷轮动而下跌近1%。当日市场特征表现为“旧经济”板块与高增长科技股之间的显著分化，投资者在消化弱于预期的ADP私营部门就业报告、美联储理事凯文·沃什的鹰派言论以及Meta Platforms颠覆AI基础设施交易格局的重大战略转型。标普500指数年初至今仍上涨约10%，但第三季度的开局表明市场领导地位正在发生转变。

top_events.title: Meta pops 9% as company makes cloud push to sell excess AI compute power capacity
top_events.title_zh: Meta因推出云业务以出售过剩AI计算能力而上涨9%

top_events.title_zh: 美国决定不续签USMCA，为与加拿大和墨西哥的谈判打开了大门

top_events.title: Chip stocks that notched record rallies in second quarter start Q3 with a dud
top_events.title_zh: 第二季度创纪录上涨的芯片股在第三季度开局表现不佳

top_events.title: Private payrolls rose by 98,000 in June, less than expected, ADP reports
top_events.title_zh: ADP报告显示6月私营部门就业人数增加9.8万，低于预期

top_events.title: Asian Stocks to Decline as Traders Weigh AI, Warsh: Markets Wrap
top_events.title_zh: 亚洲股市预计下跌，交易员权衡AI影响与沃什言论

reports.dynamic_headline: Wall Street caps its best quarter in six years as a record AI-driven chip rally and broadening market participation offset geopolitical risks and Fed rate jitters.
reports.dynamic_headline_zh: 华尔街创下六年来最佳季度表现，人工智能驱动的创纪录芯片涨势及市场参与度扩大，抵消了地缘政治风险和美联储利率担忧。
reports.market_summary: U.S. equity markets closed higher on Tuesday, June 30, 2026, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average hitting a fresh record high and the S&P 500 and Nasdaq posting their best quarterly performances since 2020. The rally was fueled by a massive surge in semiconductor stocks, as the artificial intelligence boom expanded beyond Nvidia to include Micron, Intel, and AMD, adding a combined $2 trillion in market value during the second quarter. Small-cap stocks also enjoyed their best first half in 35 years, signaling a broadening of the rally beyond mega-cap tech. However, the day's gains were tempered by a late-session tech selloff that stirred bubble fears, a hawkish comment from Cleveland Fed President Hammack suggesting AI could fuel inflation and necessitate rate hikes, and a sharp decline in oil prices, with Brent posting its biggest monthly drop since March 2020 amid U.S.-Iran talks.
reports.market_summary_zh: 美国股市于2026年6月30日（周二）收高，道琼斯工业平均指数创下历史新高，标普500指数和纳斯达克指数则录得自2020年以来最佳季度表现。此轮涨势由半导体股票的大幅飙升推动，人工智能热潮已从英伟达扩展至美光、英特尔和AMD，这三家公司在第二季度合计增加了2万亿美元市值。小盘股也迎来了35年来最佳的上半年表现，表明涨势正从超大盘科技股向外扩散。然而，当日涨幅因尾盘科技股抛售（引发泡沫担忧）、克利夫兰联储主席哈马克发表鹰派言论（暗示人工智能可能推高通胀并需加息），以及油价因美伊谈判而大幅下跌（布伦特原油创下自2020年3月以来最大月度跌幅）而受到抑制。

top_events.title: Record chip rally adds $2 trillion in combined value to Micron, Intel and AMD in second quarter
top_events.title_zh: 创纪录的芯片涨势在第二季度为美光、英特尔和AMD合计增加2万亿美元市值

top_events.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq post best quarter since 2020 despite Iran war
top_events.title_zh: 标普500和纳斯达克创2020年以来最佳季度表现，无视伊朗战争

top_events.title: Cleveland Fed President Hammack says AI could fuel inflation, rate hikes may be necessary
top_events.title_zh: 克利夫兰联储主席哈马克表示人工智能可能推高通胀，可能有必要加息

top_events.title: Small-cap stocks enjoy their best first half in 35 years
top_events.title_zh: 小盘股录得35年来最佳上半年表现

top_events.title: Brent posts biggest monthly decline since March 2020 as traders monitor U.S.-Iran talks
top_events.title_zh: 布伦特原油录得自2020年3月以来最大月度跌幅，交易员关注美伊谈判

reports.dynamic_headline: Wall Street rallies on a fragile U.S.-Iran truce and a wave of corporate catalysts, with the Dow closing at a record high as tech and space stocks surge.
reports.dynamic_headline_zh: 华尔街在脆弱的美伊休战及一波企业催化剂推动下反弹，道指收于纪录高位，科技与太空股飙升。
reports.market_summary: U.S. equity markets closed sharply higher on Monday, recovering from a rare losing week as a confluence of geopolitical and corporate catalysts drove broad-based buying. The Dow Jones Industrial Average notched a new record closing high, the Nasdaq surged over 2%, and the S&P 500 reclaimed a key technical level. The primary catalyst was a U.S.-Iran agreement to halt hostilities, which de-escalated a major geopolitical risk and sent oil prices higher while boosting risk appetite. This was amplified by a flurry of company-specific news, including Comcast's blockbuster plan to spin off NBCUniversal, a long-awaited Tesla self-driving update, and a surge in space-related stocks following Rocket Lab's $8 billion Iridium acquisition and SpaceX's massive bond sale. The rally was broad, with technology, semiconductors, and telecoms leading, while the financial sector saw mixed performance amid rising funding costs.
reports.market_summary_zh: 美国股市周一大幅收高，从罕见的下跌周中反弹，地缘政治与企业催化剂共同作用引发广泛买盘。道琼斯工业平均指数创下收盘纪录新高，纳斯达克指数飙升逾2%，标普500指数重新站上一个关键技术位。主要催化剂是美国与伊朗达成停止敌对行动的协议，这缓和了一项重大地缘政治风险，推高油价的同时提振了风险偏好。一系列公司特定新闻放大了这一效应，包括康卡斯特分拆NBC环球的重磅计划、特斯拉期待已久的自动驾驶更新，以及火箭实验室80亿美元收购铱星公司和SpaceX大规模债券发行后太空相关股票的飙升。涨势普遍，科技、半导体和电信板块领涨，而金融板块因融资成本上升表现不一。

top_events.title: U.S. and Iran reach deal to halt attacks, oil prices rise
top_events.title_zh: 美国和伊朗达成协议停止攻击，油价上涨

top_events.title: U.S. Market Close | Tech stocks staged a strong rebound, with the Nasdaq rising over 2% and the Dow closing at a record high; semiconductor equipment stocks surged, with Applied Materials up nearly 11% to a new high; Rocket Lab soared 16% after annou
top_events.title_zh: 美股收盘 | 科技股强势反弹，纳指涨超2%，道指创收盘新高；半导体设备股飙升，应用材料涨近11%创新高；火箭实验室宣布后飙升16%

reports.dynamic_headline: Markets rebound as tech stabilizes, Alphabet's Dow debut boosts sentiment, and a US-Iran truce lifts oil prices, while a Supreme Court ruling protects Fed independence.
reports.dynamic_headline_zh: 市场反弹，科技板块企稳，Alphabet 登陆道琼斯指数提振情绪，美伊停火推高油价，最高法院裁决捍卫美联储独立性。
reports.market_summary: US equity markets ended a volatile session higher on Monday, recovering from last week's losses. The rebound was fueled by a halt in the tech sector selloff, a strong debut for Alphabet on the Dow Jones Industrial Average, and a geopolitical truce between the US and Iran that lifted oil prices. The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose, supported by Alphabet's 4% surge, while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq also posted gains. The market's focus was split between easing geopolitical tensions and a key Supreme Court ruling that temporarily blocked President Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook, reinforcing the central bank's independence.
reports.market_summary_zh: 美国股市周一在震荡交易中收高，收复了上周的部分失地。此次反弹得益于科技板块抛售的暂停、Alphabet 在道琼斯工业平均指数上的强势首秀，以及美伊之间推高油价的地缘政治停火。道琼斯工业平均指数上涨，受到 Alphabet 飙升 4% 的支撑，标普 500 指数和纳斯达克指数也录得涨幅。市场焦点分散在地缘政治紧张局势缓和与一项关键的最高法院裁决之间，该裁决暂时阻止了特朗普总统解雇美联储理事丽莎·库克的企图，从而强化了央行的独立性。

top_events.title: US and Iran Reach Truce, Agree to Talks in Qatar
top_events.title_zh: 美国和伊朗达成停火、同意在卡塔尔会谈

top_events.title_zh: 华尔街误读了美联储？科技和房地产股票的隐藏上行催化剂

top_events.title: Alphabet Joins Dow Jones Industrial Average, Stock Surges

top_events.title: Supreme Court Rules Trump Cannot Fire Fed Governor Lisa Cook
top_events.title_zh: 最高法院裁定特朗普不能解雇美联储理事丽莎·库克

reports.dynamic_headline: Escalating US-Iran tensions and AI sector rotation dominate markets as investors brace for jobs data and Nike earnings.
reports.dynamic_headline_zh: 美伊紧张局势升级与AI板块轮动主导市场，投资者静待就业数据与耐克财报
reports.market_summary: Global markets experienced mixed trading amid escalating US-Iran military conflict, with defense and energy stocks rallying while AI and tech names continued to slide. The Dow Jones Industrial Average logged its worst day since March, and the S&P 500 and Nasdaq snapped multi-week winning streaks. However, futures pointed higher Monday morning, driven by a rebound in AI-related stocks and hopes for de-escalation. Crude oil prices dropped near pre-war levels, suggesting markets are pricing in a contained conflict. The focus this week is squarely on the June jobs report and Nike's pivotal earnings.
reports.market_summary_zh: 全球市场在美伊军事冲突升级中涨跌互现，国防和能源股上涨，而AI和科技股继续回调。道琼斯工业平均指数录得3月以来最差单日表现，标普500和纳斯达克指数终结了数周连涨。然而，周一早盘期货走高，受AI相关股票反弹和局势缓和预期的推动。原油价格跌至接近战前水平，表明市场正在定价一场有限的冲突。本周焦点集中于6月就业报告和耐克的关键财报。

top_events.title: US and Israel strike Iran; Iran retaliates against US facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain
top_events.title_zh: 美国和以色列打击伊朗；伊朗报复科威特和巴林的美军设施

top_events.title: Jobs week begins: Nike earnings and June payrolls in focus
top_events.title_zh: 就业周开启：耐克财报和6月非农数据成焦点

top_events.title: AI bubble fears mount; leverage driving rally becomes growing concern
top_events.title_zh: AI泡沫担忧加剧；杠杆推动上涨成为日益担忧的问题

top_events.title: Federal Reserve rate hike - good news for the market?
top_events.title_zh: 美联储加息——对市场是个好消息？

top_events.title: The Ultimate AI Power Supercycle Winner: NextEra Energy or Vistra Stock?
top_events.title_zh: 人工智能超级周期中的终极赢家：NextEra Energy 还是 Vistra 股票？

reports.dynamic_headline: Markets rotate away from AI as geopolitical risks, oil weakness, and a historic memory shortage reshape sector leadership.
reports.dynamic_headline_zh: 市场从AI板块轮动转出，地缘政治风险、油价疲软及历史性的内存短缺重塑板块领导格局。
reports.market_summary: U.S. equities ended a volatile week mixed, with the Nasdaq under pressure from a cooling AI trade while the Dow and small-caps found support from rotation into value and energy-exposed stocks. Crude oil fell below $70/bbl despite a tanker strike in the Strait of Hormuz, as demand fears overwhelmed supply concerns. The AI trade cooled sharply after Oracle posted its worst weekly loss since the dot-com bust, and Micron's strong earnings failed to lift the sector. A historic memory shortage is hitting smaller consumer electronics companies, while Apple and Microsoft raise prices. Geopolitical headlines included a U.S.-Iran ceasefire under strain and a framework for Israel-Lebanon peace, but tariffs on digital services from Trump and a new billionaires tax proposal from Newsom added policy uncertainty. Solar energy surpassed coal for the first time, and SpaceX's fast-track inclusion into the Nasdaq-100 drove thematic ETF demand. Bond yields fell on falling oil and fading inflation fears, with trading in TIPS and nominal Treasuries signaling overblown inflation concerns.
reports.market_summary_zh: 美国股市本周收盘涨跌互现，波动性较大。纳斯达克因AI交易降温承压，而道琼斯工业指数和小盘股则因资金轮动至价值股和能源相关股票获得支撑。尽管霍尔木兹海峡发生油轮遇袭事件，但原油价格仍跌破70美元/桶，原因是需求担忧压倒了供应担忧。甲骨文遭遇自互联网泡沫以来最大单周跌幅，而美光强劲的财报也未能提振整个板块，导致AI交易急剧冷却。历史性的内存短缺对小规模消费电子公司造成冲击，而苹果和微软则纷纷提价。地缘政治头条包括脆弱的美国-伊朗停火协议和以色列-黎巴嫩和平框架，但特朗普对数字服务税征收关税的威胁以及纽森提出的新亿万富翁税提案增加了政策不确定性。太阳能发电量首次超越煤炭，SpaceX快速纳入纳斯达克100指数推动了主题ETF需求。债券收益率因油价下跌和通胀担忧减弱而下降，TIPS和名义国债的交易信号表明通胀担忧过度。

top_events.title: Oracle Stock Has Worst Week Since 2001 Dot-Com Bust as AI Financing Concerns Escalate
top_events.title_zh: 甲骨文股价遭遇2001年互联网泡沫以来最糟糕一周，AI融资担忧升级

top_events.title: Tanker struck in Strait of Hormuz as U.S.-Iran tensions escalate
top_events.title_zh: 油轮在霍尔木兹海峡遭袭，美伊紧张局势升级

top_events.title: The AI trade cooled and oil sank. A closer look at Wall Street's volatile week
top_events.title_zh: 人工智能交易降温，油价下跌——华尔街波动一周回顾

top_events.title: Tanker Struck in Strait of Hormuz as U.S.-Iran Tensions Escalate Despite Ceasefire
top_events.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡油轮遇袭，美伊紧张局势升级，尽管存在停火协议

top_events.title: Memory Shortage 'Existential Crisis' for Small Players as Apple, Microsoft Raise Prices
top_events.title_zh: 内存短缺'生存危机'：小厂商承压，苹果和微软提价

reports.market_summary: US equity markets ended the week lower, driven by a sharp sell-off in technology stocks as investors questioned the return on massive AI investments. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq snapped two-week winning streaks, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average eked out a modest gain. A rotation out of mega-cap tech into value and healthcare sectors was evident. Geopolitical tensions escalated after the US launched retaliatory strikes on Iran, though crude oil prices fell below $70/bbl on demand concerns. Inflation fears remained elevated with CPI above 4%, and Minneapolis Fed President Kashkari signaled a likely rate hike this year. The market is pricing in a cautious outlook amid conflicting signals from macro data, earnings, and policy developments.
reports.market_summary_zh: 美国股市本周收低，因科技股大幅抛售，投资者质疑大规模AI投资的回报。标普500指数和纳斯达克指数结束了连续两周的上涨势头，而道琼斯工业平均指数小幅上涨。资金从超大市值科技股轮动至价值和医疗保健板块的迹象明显。在美国对伊朗发动报复性打击后，地缘政治紧张局势升级，但由于需求担忧，原油价格跌破每桶70美元。通胀担忧仍居高不下，CPI高于4%，明尼阿波利斯联储主席卡什卡利暗示今年可能加息。市场在宏观数据、盈利和政策发展发出的相互矛盾的信号中，对前景持谨慎态度。

top_events.title: U.S. launches retaliatory military strikes on Iran after ceasefire violation in Strait of Hormuz
top_events.title_zh: 美国在霍尔木兹海峡停火协议被违反后对伊朗发动报复性军事打击

top_events.title: Minneapolis Fed's Kashkari expects a rate hike this year as inflation tops 4%
top_events.title_zh: 明尼阿波利斯联储的卡什卡利预计今年将加息，因通胀超过4%

top_events.title: Memory chip shortage becomes existential for smaller electronics makers as Apple and Microsoft raise prices

top_events.title: OpenAI delays IPO timeline, stoking concerns about AI monetization and valuation
top_events.title_zh: OpenAI推迟IPO时间表，引发对AI变现和估值的担忧

reports.market_summary: A broad-based tech sell-off dominated U.S. equity markets on Friday, triggered by a report that OpenAI is delaying its IPO until 2027. The Nasdaq Composite fell sharply, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average managed modest gains on a rotation into energy and financial stocks. Rising inflation above 4%, hawkish Fed commentary, and fresh geopolitical tensions in the Strait of Hormuz added to risk-off sentiment. Commodities saw steep declines, with gold and silver falling significantly, while crude oil rose on supply fears.

reports.market_summary: Global equities plunge on June 23, 2026, led by a deepening technology rout as AI monetization fears, high-profile Alphabet departures, and Nvidia chip price concerns rattle investor confidence. S&P 500 and Nasdaq futures point to heavy losses, with contagion spreading to European and Asian markets. The selloff is exacerbated by private credit liquidity fears after Apollo capped redemptions. Offsetting these headwinds, oil prices drop sharply on sweeping U.S. sanctions waivers for Iran, easing geopolitical risk and inflation pressures. Global M&A remains a bright spot, on track for a $4 trillion year, but risk appetite is decisively 'risk-off'.

top_events.title: Tech Rout Intensifies as AI Monetization Concerns Mount
Sweeping Iran Oil Sanctions Relief Unleashes Supply, Pressures Crude
Apollo Caps Redemptions as 17% Exit Requests Rekindle Private Credit Worries
NHTSA Investigates Fatal Tesla Crash Involving Autopilot in Texas
Kalshi Traders Bet Nvidia Chip Prices Are Coming Down

reports.market_summary: US equity markets are under heavy pressure on Tuesday, June 23, 2026, with futures pointing to a sharp sell-off led by technology stocks. The Nasdaq is set to extend losses as concerns mount over AI spending sustainability, rising chip costs being questioned, and a strengthening dollar. Oil prices are sliding on news of sweeping US sanctions waivers on Iranian crude, while investors also await key PCE inflation data. Broader risk appetite is fading as global tech routs spread from Wall Street to Asian and European markets.

top_events.title: Global Tech Rout Intensifies as AI Stocks Lead Sell-Off
US Issues Sweeping Iran Oil Sanctions Waivers, Treasury Authorizes Imports
SpaceX Stock Tumbles 16.4%, Erasing Most Post-IPO Gains
Nvidia Stock Struggles as Kalshi Traders Bet Chip Prices Are Coming Down
Alphabet Has Worst Day in a Year on High-Profile AI Researcher Exits

reports.market_summary: Global markets tumbled into a sharp risk-off session on Tuesday as a deepening technology sell-off—sparked by Alphabet’s AI departures and Nvidia chip pricing fears—cascaded across regions. U.S. index futures pointed to heavy losses, with the Nasdaq-100 and S&P 500 down sharply. The rout overshadowed geopolitical progress: the U.S. issued sweeping waivers on Iranian oil sanctions, pushing crude prices lower. A hawkish Fed repricing ahead of the PCE inflation data and a private-credit redemption scare at Apollo added to the gloom. Luxury EV maker Lucid and legacy chip giant Intel further soured sentiment with grim operational updates, while SpaceX’s post-IPO plunge illustrated the exhaustion of retail momentum.

top_events.title: Global Tech Sell-Off Intensifies, S&P 500 and Nasdaq Futures Tumble
